instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is sophia_martin_4574. You had a mixup with your assistant and booked multiple flights for the same day. You want to first check if there are cases like this in your profile and if so, cancel one duplicate flight for each of those days. If and only if the agent asks you, you will be in Los Angeles (LAX) on May 17 and in Boston (BOS) on May 22

dialogue_state.initial_segment: check if there are cases like booked multiple flights for the same day in your profile
dialogue_state.initial_query: Check for multiple flights booked the same day in my profile

hints.segment: cancel one duplicate flight for each of those days
hints.hint: If there are duplicate flights for a day, cancel one of them

hints.segment: you will be in Los Angeles (LAX) on May 17
hints.hint: I'll be in Los Angeles (LAX) on May 17, if that's needed

hints.segment: you will be in Boston (BOS) on May 22
hints.hint: I'll be in Boston (BOS) on May 22, if that's needed
